sessions.name: phase-1-pty-embedding
sessions.goal: Embed cds in a PTY with fixed-grid ANSI rendering
sessions.scope: Phase 1: spawn cds via portable-pty, render ANSI output as styled ratatui Text using tmux-style fixed-grid approach. Input passthrough (typing, arrows, Ctrl+C, Tab, F-keys). Quit on Ctrl+Q.

sessions.name: phase-2-sidebar
sessions.goal: Add sidebar with session list and focus switching
sessions.scope: Phase 2: read ~/.claude/sessions/*.json, render session list with status indicators, 30/70 layout split, Tab focus switching, arrow/vim key navigation, workspace-aware filtering, session detail overlay.

sessions.name: phase-3-session-replay
sessions.goal: View historical session transcripts in the PTY panel
sessions.scope: Enter on session loads JSONL transcript, renders user/assistant messages and tool calls with scroll support (↑↓/PgUp/PgDn/Home), Esc/Tab returns to live cds. ViewMode enum switches between Live and Transcript.

sessions.name: session-registry
sessions.goal: Two-tier session registry for team visibility
sessions.scope: Tier 1: global overview at ~/.claude/sessions.json scanning all workspaces. Tier 2: per-repo .claude/sessions.json with goal/scope/status/tags. Auto-merges live session data. Survives ephemeral session cleanup.
